_note: Fully deterministic. Uses hello-dcs (ghcr.io/rummens) for both Deployments; the secret flow is env/manifest-only. Ends by cleaning up the two Deployments + Secret it created.

steps.run: envsubst < deploy-leaky.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deploy/leaky-app --timeout=120s
oc set env deploy/leaky-app --list | grep API_TOKEN
envsubst < deploy-fixed.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deploy/fixed-app --timeout=120s
oc set env deploy/fixed-app --list | grep API_TOKEN
oc get secret app-secrets -o jsonpath='{.data.api-token}' | base64 -d; echo
